asset.title: Startup Diligence Live Join
asset.purpose: README live walkthrough clip. Judge whether the feature is obvious, visually consistent, and credible as evidence.

judge.summary: The walkthrough clearly demonstrates multi-user collaboration in a shared diligence room using a join code, showing real-time state synchronization and chat interactions.

featureClarity.evidence: Demonstrates room creation, code sharing, and multiple users joining the same session.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Shows the end-to-end flow from room creation to multiple users joining and interacting.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark-mode interface with clear layout and readable text elements.

consistency.evidence: Aligns with the NodeRoom workspace concept featuring shared files, chat, and room traces.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Captured from a live browser session showing authentic UI transitions and inputs.

legibility.evidence: The UI text, join codes, and chat messages remain readable throughout the clip.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly relevant for financial and diligence teams requiring real-time collaboration.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately represents the multi-user joining process without simulated shortcuts.

observedEvidence: Real-time chat updates and room trace synchronization

defects.observed: The transition between different user perspectives is very rapid, which might momentarily confuse viewers.
defects.fix: Add a brief visual label or transition effect indicating a switch to another user's browser window.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Watch how multiple team members join a shared startup-banking diligence room in real-time using a secure room code to collaborate on research and analysis.
